name: Webhook divide (triggered) demo
description: Development-Plan Increment 8 walkthrough: a webhook-triggered workflow (ENG-130) whose script node fails on division by zero (ERR-100), producing inspectable execution history (DBG-140) and a dead letter (ERR-130) that can be re-run after the request is fixed.

config.code: var body = JSON.parse(payload.body); if (body.divisor === 0) { throw new Error('division by zero'); } ({ result: 100 / body.divisor });
